allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\(''''fs''''\).readFileSync\(0,''''utf8''''\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const v=j.data?.versions?.[0] || j.data; console.log\(JSON.stringify\({title:j.data?.title, defaultRunInput: j.data?.defaultRunInput}, null, 2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\(''''fs''''\).readFileSync\(0,''''utf8''''\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); if\(j.profile\) { console.log\(''''Name:'''', j.profile.display_name\); console.log\(''''Bio:'''', j.profile.bio?.slice\(0,100\)\); console.log\(''''PFP:'''', j.profile.profile_pic_url?.slice\(0,80\)\); console.log\(''''Tweets:'''', j.profile.recent_posts?.length\); if\(j.profile.recent_posts?.[0]\) console.log\(''''First tweet:'''', j.profile.recent_posts[0].slice\(0,80\)\); } else { console.log\(''''Error:'''', j.error\); }")

Bash(node -e "const h=require\(''''fs''''\).readFileSync\(0,''''utf8''''\); const metas=[]; const re=/<meta[^>]+>/gi; let m; while\(m=re.exec\(h\)\){metas.push\(m[0]\)}; metas.forEach\(m=>console.log\(m\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\(''''fs''''\).readFileSync\(0,''''utf8''''\); try{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const u=j.data?.user; if\(u\){console.log\(''''Name:'''', u.full_name\); console.log\(''''Bio:'''', u.biography?.slice\(0,100\)\); console.log\(''''Followers:'''', u.edge_followed_by?.count\); console.log\(''''Following:'''', u.edge_follow?.count\); console.log\(''''PFP:'''', u.profile_pic_url_hd?''''YES'''':''''NO''''\); console.log\(''''Posts:'''', u.edge_owner_to_timeline_media?.count\)} else console.log\(''''No user, raw:'''', d.slice\(0,300\)\)}catch\(e\){console.log\(''''Parse error, raw:'''', d.slice\(0,300\)\)}")
